category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Cadence as a resource-oriented smart contract programming language; official onflow/cadence README describes it as a resource-oriented programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cadence; official cadence-lang.org and onflow/cadence use the Cadence name.
docs_sources: Official project homepage is cadence-lang.org; official repository README points to Cadence Docs and stores development/language-reference docs in /docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/onflow/cadence; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official onflow/cadence README topics and description mention programming language, smart contracts, resource-oriented design, and Flow.
